DatasetDOI: TODO: eventually a DOI for the dataset
HowToAcknowledge:
Papers, book chapters, books, posters, oral presentations, and all other printed and digital presentations of results derived from this dataset should contain the following wording in the acknowledgments section: 
"Data were provided [in part] by the Superior Colliculus Pathways for Defensive Behavior and Emotional Arousal Project (Principal Investigator: Philip Kragel; 1R01MH134972) funded by the National Institute of Mental Health"
They should also cite the following publication:

"Monica Thieu, Meera Sethi, Elias Aberman, Philip Kragel. (2026). Human superior colliculus pathways represent the form and motion of looming objects. Cell Reports."
Name: Superior Colliculus Pathways for Looming and Threat
